home.heroHeadline: A self-sustaining Ikeduru, built by its own people
home.heroSubhead: IEDF brings together Ikeduru people at home and in the diaspora, committed to advancing Ikeduru's development through private-sector led investment, community advocacy, and real economic development.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Get updates on IEDF's progress, delivered a couple of times a month.

footer.apolitical: IEDF is a non-governmental, non-profit, and apolitical organization.
